causal_chain.from: Observation of the sun's movement across the sky
causal_chain.to: Belief that the sun revolves around the Earth
causal_chain.mechanism: Direct visual interpretation of observed motion as orbital path

confounders: Lack of understanding of relative motion
Geocentric worldview prevalent at the time
missing_links: Absence of evidence supporting Earth's immobility
Lack of a comprehensive model of gravity and celestial mechanics
